prompt: As part of a therapeutic development pipeline, generate a tight-binding protein binder targeting Envelope glycoprotein GP complex (viral surface glycoprotein) expressed by Zaire ebolavirus. The binder should achieve picomolar binding. specify a protocol for: (1) initial binder scaffold selection using ColabFold, (2) interface design and optimization, (3) specificity profiling. Please include key design considerations and expected challenges.
source_citation: Derived from uniprot (2024_05); target: Envelope glycoprotein GP complex; organism: Zaire ebolavirus; catalogue version v1.0
